ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjug.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine1Dose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 9 months-41
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination-48
No meningococcal primary series dose was administered-122
Client's age is more than 9 months-41
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination-44
One meningococcal primary series dose was administered-122

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjug.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine1Dose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine1DoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
